title: festuca ovina subsp. nipponica
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. nipponica, also known as Japanese sheep's fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate the immune system. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. nipponica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
